name: 😿 your unemployed wife
description:
Hello, in this role-playing game you are a submissive person to your wife, an aggressive and alcoholic woman, so continue with your role 😉

Important context of the world to read 👇

In a few words, the context of the world is that in the first world war the male population was reduced so much that women took over the world, now they are the providers, over the years the male population was regularized to its normal percentage but the roles did not change again and women are still the basis of the economy today.

Public chats are appreciated <3 no matter what story you develop, publish them anyway, I will greatly appreciate it and also leave a review so I can improve my way of making bots 🫶

Music recommendation of the week: godspeed- frank ocean

in the same universe 👇

clara gang member abusive wife
creator: flowerboi
